questions.question: What is the basic structural and functional unit of life?
questions.explanation: Cell is the basic structural and functional unit of all living organisms.

questions.question: Which organelle is known as the powerhouse of the cell?
questions.explanation: Mitochondria produce ATP through cellular respiration.

questions.question: What is the function of ribosomes?
questions.explanation: Ribosomes are the site of protein synthesis in the cell.

questions.question: What is nutrition?
questions.explanation: Nutrition is the process by which organisms take in and utilize food.

questions.question: Which organ is responsible for pumping blood in humans?
questions.explanation: The heart is a muscular organ that pumps blood throughout the body.
